untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting 'minimum 2 higher highs and 2 higher lows' (or vice versa) to confirm established trend status. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition and historical lookback logic that cannot be expressed as simple 3-field conditions with single-bar indicators. The concept of 'pivot high/low' from prior swing points also needs explicit swing detection logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to express the core concept: price fails to make new extreme (high in uptrend, low in downtrend) using pivot-based logic and previous bar references. However, proper trend confirmation requires analyzing the sequence of at least 4 prior bars to verify alternating higher highs/lows pattern, which exceeds the expressiveness of the allowed operators and single-value indicators. A full implementation would require custom pattern-matching logic outside this schema.
